notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Survival Hunter gear guide (anchor t15-best-in-slot). Blends pieces seen on both the Beast Mastery and Marksmanship pages. Tier set: Saurok Stalker's line. Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list.
